artifact_context: This is a compliance artifact for SecureTech Inc., a ~100-person cybersecurity startup pursuing alignment with NIST CSF 2.0, SOC 2 Type II, and ISO 27001:2022. Compliance artifacts must demonstrate understanding of control objectives, implementation status, and the relationships between frameworks.

criteria.description: Addresses the major functions/categories/domains of the framework, not just a subset
Controls are explained with enough detail to understand what they require — not just control IDs copied from the framework
Each control is marked: Implemented / Partially Implemented / Not Implemented / Not Applicable
Shows which controls across frameworks are equivalent or related (the crosswalk)
Gaps are named specifically and include a recommended remediation action
Applies framework controls to the specific context of a cybersecurity startup — not generic
Gaps are ranked by severity or business impact — not a flat list
Uses proper terms: control objectives, trust service criteria, annex controls, subcategories, etc.
